description: Best public Mississippi baseline. Paths are local caches and are intentionally not committed.

sources.name: maris_parcels
sources.notes: Public MARIS statewide parcel situs fallback; broad coverage but lower quality than point addresses.

sources.name: maris_point_addresses
sources.notes: Public MARIS point-address ZIPs; public page exposes only a subset of counties.

sources.name: openaddresses_direct
sources.notes: Normalized CSVs queried from the current OpenAddresses Mississippi source catalog.

sources.name: manual_verified_ms
sources.notes: Locally verified missing-address supplement maintained by the app.
